youtubeChannels.name: januslog
youtubeChannels.description: City-guide travel vlogger with a full Toulon France walk-through episode

bloggers.name: International Living — Toulon, France
bloggers.description: Toulon-specific IL hub. Sunniest city in France; ~35% cheaper than Paris, 25% cheaper than Nice. Affordable Med-coast alternative to glitzier Riviera.

bloggers.name: Green-acres Journal — Why Live in Var
bloggers.description: Region overview of Var (Toulon's department) — Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Mediterranean coast, Saint-Tropez to Verdon Gorges, expat town clusters (Fayence, Lorgues, Cotignac).
